overall.description: A first-person perspective video game clip showing a character walking through a wooden gate in a stone wall at night, then proceeding along a dirt path through an open grassy field. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight, creating a focused pool of warm light on the ground against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone walled entrance with wooden gate

events.description: passing through the wooden gate from the enclosed stone wall corridor into the open field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through the wooden gate, illuminating the path with a flashlight

entered.detail: rough stone wall running along the left side of the path
rough stone wall running along the right side of the path
simple wooden plank gate set between the stone walls
narrow dirt trail leading through the gate

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow corridor formed by stone walls on both sides, approaching a wooden gate. The scene is dark, illuminated only by a flashlight beam on the ground. The camera moves steadily forward and passes through the gate, transitioning from the enclosed entrance to the open field beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy field with dirt path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the open field, flashlight illuminating the ground and grass ahead

entered.detail: tall grass field extending into the darkness on both sides of the path
dark tree line visible on the horizon against the night sky
single large tree visible on the left side of the field

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the scene opens into a wide grassy field at night. The dirt path continues forward, flanked by tall grass. A large tree on the left side gradually approaches as the camera walks forward, while the stone walls and gate recede behind. The flashlight beam reveals scattered rocks on the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined stone passageway into the expansive darkness of an open field. It begins by moving steadily through a narrow corridor of stone walls, with a flashlight beam cutting through the dark to illuminate the ground ahead. As the camera passes through a wooden gate, the enclosed space abruptly opens into a wide grassy landscape under a night sky. The scene then shifts to a dirt path flanked by tall grass, where the flashlight reveals scattered rocks on the ground as the stone entrance recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera continues forward along the trail, gradually approaching a large tree standing on the left side of the field.
